subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-07-08 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: Man must be freed from every material tie... Praising one's self is the sign of selfishness. Commanding others is not the passport to the realm of spiritual progress
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
